block_01: Anybody who has ever found themselves in a difficult financial situation has thought about their relationship with money. The term “financial health” is a concept that measures how well a person manages his or her funds. It encompasses several components: predictable expenses, consistent savings, steady income and more.
block_02: In order to be successful, it is crucial to improve your financial health and have a clear system when dealing with money. In this material, we give you an instruction on how to evaluate your personal financial health and tips to improve it.
block_03: This article is part one of our financial literacy series before the new year. Prepare your finances for 2022 now! Check the full article for useful insights.
